sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86627" key="proapoba/llw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-βάλλω</orth>, <sense id="n86627.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw away, lose before,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ φρόνημα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:7:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
